purpose: Define the source-backed contract for deterministic operator cockpit reports that join one swarm run, remote RCH proof lanes, quiescence and obligation verdicts, latency percentiles, memory brownout decisions, contention hotspots, minimizer status, redaction policy, and release-evidence provenance.

fixture_reports.name: healthy_run
fixture_reports.requirement: Required fields, RCH provenance, fresh HEAD, redaction policy, quiescence, clean obligations, and nominal contention produce pass with stable JSON and compact deterministic text.

fixture_reports.name: scenario_alignment
fixture_reports.requirement: Proof lanes, contention ledgers, and minimizer reports must belong to the same scenario_id as the cockpit report; mismatches yield malformed.

fixture_reports.name: degraded_brownout
fixture_reports.requirement: A brownout_optional memory decision is explicit and publishable, but yields degraded rather than pass.

fixture_reports.name: incomplete_trace
fixture_reports.requirement: Missing quiescence or obligation fields yields malformed, never pass.

fixture_reports.name: minimized_failure
fixture_reports.requirement: A minimized failure report surfaces minimizer status, first failure, and next owner bead, yielding degraded.

fixture_reports.name: stale_proof_evidence
fixture_reports.requirement: Expected and observed HEAD mismatch yields stale_evidence and records stale proof-lane ids.

fixture_reports.name: missing_rch_provenance
fixture_reports.requirement: Remote-required lanes without observed RCH provenance yield blocked and record missing proof_lanes.remote_provenance.

fixture_reports.name: redaction_failure
fixture_reports.requirement: Any unredacted secret-like value yields malformed and redaction_preserved=false.

semantic_rules.fail_closed_missing_scenario: Missing scenario or empty scenario_id must set outcome to malformed.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_quiescence: Missing quiescence evidence from the trace summary must set outcome to malformed.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_obligations: Missing obligation fields must set obligation_verdict to missing and outcome to malformed.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_rch: Every remote-required proof lane must include observed RCH worker provenance before the report can pass.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_stale_head: Any proof lane with stale HEAD evidence must set outcome to stale_evidence before degraded/pass classification.
semantic_rules.scenario_alignment: Trace summary, proof lanes, contention ledger, and minimizer original scenario evidence must all match scenario.scenario_id; mismatches yield malformed.
semantic_rules.redaction_policy: A nonempty redaction_policy_id and zero secret_like_value_count are required for publication.
semantic_rules.compact_text: The text renderer is deterministic and compact enough for Agent Mail handoff evidence.
semantic_rules.no_runtime_dependency: The cockpit report is a deterministic report builder and does not introduce another executor, runtime, ambient telemetry source, branch, worktree, or deletion step.

proof_lane.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_swarm_operator_cockpit_report cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_operator_cockpit_report_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_lane.scope: Focused contract tests for the operator cockpit report schema, deterministic text renderer, and fail-closed acceptance cases.

forbidden_semantics: report pass with missing scenario id
report pass with missing quiescence verdict
report pass with missing obligation verdict
report pass without remote RCH provenance
report pass against stale HEAD evidence
report pass with proof, contention, or minimizer evidence from another scenario
drop minimizer status or next owner bead
delete files as part of cockpit reporting
